archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Mode Technical Brutalism)
vision: A groundbreaking $5T genetic computing platform where every digital artifact is a living blueprint (seed). Interface must feel like a quantum supercomputer command center.

mono.usage: Gene data, seed hashes, lineage IDs, and structural metrics.

rules: No generic sans-serif for headings (Inter is banned for headings).
Use extreme weight contrast: Black (900) for H1, Light (300) for subtitles.
Overlines and small labels MUST be uppercase, JetBrains Mono, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs.

landing_page.alignment: Aggressive asymmetry, overlapping elements. Use The Swiss Grid approach.

creation_studio.grid_mode: Mode B: The Control Room Grid
creation_studio.alignment: Dense, functional, every pixel utilized. Strict border-collapse style grids.

surfaces_and_borders.panels: Cardless design. Raw 1px solid borders (border-neutral-800). No soft drop shadows.
surfaces_and_borders.prompt_bar: The Tracing Beam: Floating element at bottom with dynamic glowing gradient border.
surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: Optical Clarity: bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-2xl, border-white/10. Used ONLY for floating contextual menus.
surfaces_and_borders.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). Primary CTA is solid Electric Orange. Secondary is pure border with hover:bg-white/10.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll (momentum, weight) required for landing page.
motion_and_interactions.microinteractions: Framer Motion staggered list reveals for MAP-Elites gallery and Gene list.

hero_background.description: Abstract geometric pattern with blue lighting. Use for the main landing page hero behind a dark gradient overlay.

lineage_tree_bg.description: Abstract molecular structure with glowing nodes. Use as a subtle, low-opacity background for the Lineage Tree or MAP-Elites view.

evolve_panel_bg.description: Abstract flowing golden lines. Use within the Evolve/Breed panel to signify mutation and energy.

vision_section.description: Glowing ring of light particles. Use for the 'Platform Vision' / Kernel architecture explanation.

architecture_and_libraries: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page to achieve overlapping bento layouts. Avoid generic UI cards.
Use Shadcn UI components for the Creation Studio (Dialogs, Select, Tabs, Sliders) but heavily strip their default styling. Make them flat, sharp, and 1px bordered.
For icons, use @phosphor-icons/react (Weight: 'regular' or 'duotone' for technical feel).
landing_page_requirements: Must have a fixed/sticky Glassmorphism header (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl).
Hero section MUST overlay the hero image with at least bg-black/60. Text must use text-shadow for readability.
Include a visual breakdown of the 7-layer architecture (Kernel -> Studio & Marketplace) using a Tetris Grid layout.
creation_studio_requirements: Layout: A massive Control Room. Left sidebar (Lineage/Gallery), Center (Preview Viewport & Prompt Bar), Right sidebar (Gene Editor, Evolve, Breed panels).
Gene Editor: Must handle 17 gene types. Group them intuitively (e.g., Physical [scalar, vector], Metaphysical [quantum, gematria, resonance, sovereignty]). Use monospaced labels and tight padding.
Prompt Bar: Placed at the bottom of the center viewport. Floating. Must have a glowing border effect.
Preview Viewport: Simulate a 3D/holographic canvas area. Center the artifact representation here.
Lineage Tree: Implement a network-style visual or a deeply nested collapsible list with JetBrains Mono font and connecting border lines.
Seed Sovereignty: Add an ECDSA signing / verification UI state in the Export Panel.
data_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='evolve-seed-button', data-testid='gene-editor-slider').
